title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on platform stability improvements, with major fixes to Salesforce automation workflows and HubSpot connectivity issues. OpsPal now better handles complex Salesforce deployments and country/state field configurations, while resolving critical connection problems that were preventing HubSpot automations from running properly.

entries.headline: Salesforce automations now handle country and state fields more reliably
details: OpsPal now automatically detects when your Salesforce org uses special country and state field configurations
Deployment workflows include better permission checking to prevent failures
Automation runs are more reliable when working with complex field setups

entries.headline: Complex Salesforce deployment workflows now run more smoothly
HubSpot automations work again after connection issue resolved
